allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml,sys; [yaml.safe_load\(open\(f\)\) or print\(f'{f}: OK'\) for f in ['.github/workflows/deploy-db.yml', '.github/workflows/deploy.yml']]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['.github/workflows/deploy-db.yml','.github/workflows/deploy.yml']\){const t=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);if\(/\\t/.test\(t\)\){console.log\(f+': TAB found \(invalid YAML\)'\);process.exit\(1\)}console.log\(f+': no tabs, reads OK \('+t.split\(/\\r?\\n/\).length+' lines\)'\)}")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "freed 5173" } else { "5173 free" })
